html:
2026-0215
2026-03-13GACOther Than Statutory AuthorityAgreement between the Government of Canada and the European Space Agency on the Protection of Classified Information Order authorizing the Prime Minister, the Minister of Foreign Affairs, or a delegate, to sign, on behalf of the Government of Canada, subject to ratification, the Agreement between the Government of Canada and the European Space Agency on the Protection of Classified Information.N/A
subject: Agreement between the Government of Canada and the European Space Agency on the Protection of Classified Information
precis: Order authorizing the Prime Minister, the Minister of Foreign Affairs, or a delegate, to sign, on behalf of the Government of Canada, subject to ratification, the Agreement between the Government of Canada and the European Space Agency on the Protection of Classified Information.
